description: This file defines the LoanApplicationDraft entity class for a Spring Boot application, representing a persisted draft of a loan application with multi-step save support. It includes fields for JSON payload data, status, risk assessment, decision details, timestamps, and versioning.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a draft of a loan application, supporting multi-step save, with fields for data, status, risk scoring, decisions, timestamps, and version control.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the loan application draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the unique identifier of the loan application draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the user ID associated with this draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the user ID associated with this draft.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload representing the draft's overall state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload representing the draft's overall state.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the JSON object mapping section keys to status metadata.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the JSON object mapping section keys to status metadata.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step in the multi-step wizard.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step in the multi-step wizard.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: getRiskScore
methods.description: Returns the computed risk score or null if not evaluated.

methods.name: setRiskScore
methods.description: Sets the computed risk score.

methods.name: getDecision
methods.description: Returns the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: setDecision
methods.description: Sets the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: getDecisionReason
methods.description: Returns the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: setDecisionReason
methods.description: Sets the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the draft was last evaluated by the risk engine.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the draft was last evaluated.

methods.name: getSubmittedAt
methods.description: Returns the submission timestamp of the draft.

methods.name: setSubmittedAt
methods.description: Sets the submission timestamp.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the optimistic concurrency token.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the optimistic concurrency token.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the last update timestamp.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the last update timestamp.
